name: ahjo default dev tools
description: Bundles small CLI utilities ahjo's preferred workflows assume (rg, fd, eza, yq, ast-grep, httpie, make) plus rtk (Claude-side token-saving proxy). Tools with their own curated upstream Feature (common-utils, git, github-cli) are not duplicated here. Applied at base-bake time after the upstream Features and after ahjo-runtime, so rtk's `rtk init -g --auto-patch` finds the freshly-installed claude binary.
